briefdescription.para: true to fix scroll position in next frame
flag to know if we are dragging objects now or not
dragging either just started, or just stopped

detaileddescription.para: Main method for drawing all \detail Not creat window. Use in window block (between ImGui::Begin and ImGui::End)

briefdescription.para: set flag of the object visibility activation after selection
get flag of the object visibility activation after selection
set flag of deselect object after hidden
get flag of deselect object after hidden

detaileddescription.para: change selection after pressed arrow up / down isDown - true if pressed arrow down, false - arrow up isShift - shift button holded
change visible (and selection) after pressed arrow up / down isDown - true if pressed F4, false - F3

briefdescription.para: select all selectable objects
set visible flag all selectable objects
set object collapse state (hiding children)
expands all objs parents in tree and scroll scene tree window so selection becomes visible
set possibility change object order
helper method for fix scroll position after change available height

detaileddescription.para: override this to customize prefix for objects in scene \detail height should be less or equal ImGui::GetFrameHeight() method should save ImGui::CursorPosY
override this add custom context menu for selected objects uniqueStr need to identify who call context menu
override this to have custom UI in "Scene" window (under opened(expanded) object line) \detail if onlyHeight is true, should return drawing height without rendering return 0.f if nothing drawing

briefdescription.para: override this to customize CollapsingHeader draw
override this to customize whole object line
draw dummy container for skipped object
function that draws collapsing header and process click on it
function that do click logic on object line (select/deselect/rename/open context)
payload object will be moved
checking the need to draw a target

memberdef.argsstring: (Object &target, bool before, bool betweenLine, const std::string &uniqueStr)
memberdef.name: makeDragDropTarget_

detaileddescription.para: "target" and "before" are "to" and "before" of SceneReorder struct betweenLine - if true requires to draw line (between two objects in tree, for ImGui to have target) counter - unique number of object in tree (needed for ImGui to differ new lines)

briefdescription.para: draw visibility checkbox and call ImGui::SameLine at the end
this function should be called after BeginChild("SceneObjectsList") (child window with scene tree)

memberdef.argsstring: (Object *meshclicked, bool isShift, bool isCtrl, const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &selected, const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &all)
memberdef.name: getPreSelection_

memberdef.argsstring: (Object *objPtr, const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &selected, const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &all)
memberdef.name: updateSelection_

briefdescription.para: class for drawing a list of scene objects (and handling interaction with it)
